completions.label: rfc

documentation.value: Creates a new React functional component with props interface and export.
Creates a React arrow function component with default export.

completions.label: rmemo

documentation.value: Creates a memoized React component using React.memo for performance optimization.

completions.label: rfref

documentation.value: Creates a React component with forwardRef for passing refs to child elements.

completions.label: rctxp

documentation.value: Creates a React Context with Provider component and custom hook.

completions.label: rcustomhook

documentation.value: Creates a custom React hook with state management.
Creates a useEffect hook with cleanup function for subscriptions and timers.

completions.label: rreducer

documentation.value: Creates a typed useReducer with action types and reducer function.

completions.label: rerrboundary

documentation.value: Creates an Error Boundary class component for catching rendering errors.
Creates a lazily loaded component with React.lazy and Suspense.
Wraps components in a Suspense boundary with a fallback UI.

completions.label: rportal

documentation.value: Creates a React Portal for rendering children into a different DOM subtree.
Wraps content in a React Fragment without adding extra DOM nodes.

completions.label: rcinput

documentation.value: Creates a controlled input with state binding and onChange handler.

completions.label: rformhandler

documentation.value: Creates a form with submit handler and state management.
Pattern for conditional rendering with ternary and logical AND.
Maps over an array to render a list with unique keys.

completions.label: rhoc

documentation.value: Creates a Higher-Order Component (HOC) that wraps a component with additional props or logic.

completions.label: rrenderprops

documentation.value: Creates a component using the render props pattern for sharing logic.

completions.label: rcompound

documentation.value: Creates a compound component with shared context between parent and children.

completions.label: rcc

documentation.value: Creates a legacy class-based React component with state and lifecycle methods.

completions.label: rpropsdestructure

documentation.value: Creates a functional component with inline props destructuring and default values.

Declares a state variable. Returns a stateful value and a function to update it.

```jsx
const [state, setState] = useState(initialState);
```

Accepts a function that contains imperative, possibly effectful code. Runs after render.

```jsx
useEffect(() => { /* effect */ return () => { /* cleanup */ }; }, [deps]);
```

Accepts a context object and returns the current context value.

```jsx
const value = useContext(MyContext);
```

An alternative to useState for complex state logic. Accepts a reducer and initial state.

```jsx
const [state, dispatch] = useReducer(reducer, initialState);
```

Returns a memoized value. Only recomputes when dependencies change.

```jsx
const memoizedValue = useMemo(() => computeExpensive(a, b), [a, b]);
```

Returns a memoized callback function. Only changes when dependencies change.

```jsx
const memoizedFn = useCallback(() => { doSomething(a, b); }, [a, b]);
```

Returns a mutable ref object whose .current property is initialized to the passed argument.

```jsx
const ref = useRef(initialValue);
```

Generates a unique ID for accessibility attributes. Stable across server and client.

```jsx
const id = useId();
```

Returns a stateful value for the pending state of a transition and a function to start it.

```jsx
const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition();
```

Accepts a value and returns a deferred version that may lag behind. Useful for expensive re-renders.

```jsx
const deferredValue = useDeferredValue(value);
```

Subscribes to an external store. Recommended for integrating with non-React state.

```jsx
const snapshot = useSyncExternalStore(subscribe, getSnapshot, getServerSnapshot?);
```

completions.label: useInsertionEffect

documentation.value:
Fires synchronously before all DOM mutations. Use for injecting styles into the DOM before layout effects.

```jsx
useInsertionEffect(() => { /* inject styles */ }, [deps]);
```

completions.label: useLayoutEffect

documentation.value:
Fires synchronously after all DOM mutations. Use for reading layout and synchronously re-rendering.

```jsx
useLayoutEffect(() => { /* read DOM */ }, [deps]);
```

Customizes the instance value that is exposed to parent components when using ref.

```jsx
useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({ focus() { ... } }), [deps]);
```

Displays a label in React DevTools for custom hooks.

```jsx
useDebugValue(value, formatFn?);
```

Allows optimistic UI updates while async actions are in progress.

```jsx
const [optimisticState, addOptimistic] = useOptimistic(state, updateFn);
```

completions.label: useFormStatus

documentation.value:
Gives status information of the last form submission. Must be called from a component rendered inside a <form>.

```jsx
const { pending, data, method, action } = useFormStatus();
```

completions.insertText: const { pending, data, method, action } = useFormStatus();

completions.label: useActionState

documentation.value:
Allows you to update state based on the result of a form action.

```jsx
const [state, formAction] = useActionState(fn, initialState, permalink?);
```

Reads the value of a resource like a Promise or context. Can be called conditionally unlike other hooks.

```jsx
const value = use(resource);
```

Create a React element. JSX is compiled to createElement calls.

```jsx
React.createElement(type, props, ...children)
```

Clone and return a new React element using element as the starting point with new props merged in.

```jsx
React.cloneElement(element, props, ...children)
```

Creates a Context object for passing data through the component tree without prop drilling.

```jsx
const MyContext = createContext(defaultValue);
```

Creates a React component that forwards the ref attribute to a child component.

```jsx
const FancyInput = forwardRef((props, ref) => <input ref={ref} />);
```

Defines a component that is loaded dynamically via code splitting.

```jsx
const OtherComponent = React.lazy(() => import('./OtherComponent'));
```

completions.label: memo

documentation.value:
Higher order component that memoizes the result. Only re-renders if props change.

```jsx
const MemoComponent = React.memo(MyComponent);
```

Marks state updates inside the callback as transitions, allowing urgent updates to interrupt them.

```jsx
startTransition(() => { setState(newValue); });
```

Creates a portal to render children into a DOM node outside the parent component hierarchy.

```jsx
createPortal(children, domNode, key?)
```

Forces React to flush any pending state updates synchronously. Use sparingly.

```jsx
flushSync(() => { setState(newValue); });
```

Hydrates a server-rendered DOM container with React components.

```jsx
const root = hydrateRoot(domNode, reactNode, options?);
```

Invokes a function on every immediate child contained within children.

```jsx
React.Children.map(children, (child, index) => { ... });
```

Like React.Children.map() but does not return an array.

```jsx
React.Children.forEach(children, (child, index) => { ... });
```

Returns the total number of components in children.

```jsx
const count = React.Children.count(children);
```

Verifies that children has only one child and returns it. Throws otherwise.

```jsx
const onlyChild = React.Children.only(children);
```

Returns the children opaque data structure as a flat array with keys assigned.

```jsx
const childArray = React.Children.toArray(children);
```

Verifies the object is a React element. Returns true or false.

```jsx
React.isValidElement(object);
```

Caches the result of a data fetch or computation. React Server Components feature.

```jsx
const getData = cache(async (id) => { ... });
```

completions.label: experimental_taintObjectReference

documentation.value:
Prevents a specific object from being passed to a Client Component. Server Components security feature.

```jsx
experimental_taintObjectReference(message, object);
```
Import default React module.
Export component as default export.
A component that lets you group elements without a wrapper DOM node. Shorthand: `<></>`.
Activates additional development-only checks and warnings for the component tree.
Lets you display a fallback UI while child components are loading (code splitting, data fetching).

completions.label: Profiler

documentation.value: Measures the rendering performance of a React tree programmatically.

completions.insertText:
<Profiler id="${1:name}" onRender={(id, phase, actualDuration) => {
  console.log({ id, phase, actualDuration });
}}>
  ${0}
</Profiler>

documentation.value:
Type alias for a functional component. Generic over props type.

```tsx
const MyComponent: React.FC<Props> = (props) => { ... };
```
Represents any renderable React content: elements, strings, numbers, fragments, portals, booleans, null, undefined.
Represents a React element returned by JSX or createElement. Narrower than ReactNode.

Type for inline style objects. All CSS properties converted to camelCase.

```tsx
const style: React.CSSProperties = { display: 'flex', gap: '1rem' };
```

Event type for onChange handlers on input, select, textarea.

```tsx
const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => { ... };
```

Event type for form submission handlers.

```tsx
const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => { e.preventDefault(); };
```

Event type for mouse event handlers (onClick, onMouseEnter, etc.).

```tsx
const handleClick = (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement>) => { ... };
```

Event type for keyboard event handlers (onKeyDown, onKeyUp, onKeyPress).

```tsx
const handleKey = (e: React.KeyboardEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => { ... };
```
Type for refs created with useRef or createRef. The .current property is read-only.
Type for mutable refs. The .current property can be freely modified.

Type for the dispatch function returned by useReducer.

```tsx
type MyDispatch = React.Dispatch<MyAction>;
```
Type for the argument to a setState function. Can be a value or updater function.
Type for a context object created by createContext.

Union type of component class and function component. Useful for HOCs.

```tsx
type HOC = (Component: React.ComponentType<Props>) => React.ComponentType<Props>;
```

Utility type that adds the `children` prop to a props type.

```tsx
type MyProps = React.PropsWithChildren<{ title: string }>;
```
Type for all standard HTML attributes for a given element type.
Represents the return type of a JSX expression. Equivalent to React.ReactElement.
Interface that maps HTML/SVG tag names to their attribute types. Used for type-checking JSX.
Named import of useState from react.
Named import of useEffect from react.
Named import of useContext from react.
Named import of useReducer from react.
Named import of useMemo from react.
Named import of useCallback from react.
Named import of useRef from react.
Import default ReactDOM module for DOM rendering.
Named import of createRoot for React 18 rendering.
Named import of createPortal for rendering outside parent hierarchy.
Named imports of commonly used React utilities.
Named imports for code-splitting support.

documentation.value: Custom hook that debounces a value over a specified delay.

documentation.value: Custom hook to detect clicks outside a referenced element.

documentation.value: Custom hook for detecting element visibility in the viewport.

documentation.value: Custom hook to detect when a specific key is pressed.
Creates a typed event handler function for React events.

completions.label: rimportall

documentation.value: Import statement for all commonly used React hooks.
Base event type for all React synthetic events. Cross-browser wrapper around native events.
Type representing any valid component type: string (intrinsic element) or component.

completions.label: rdynamic

documentation.value: Pattern for dynamically rendering components based on a map.

completions.label: rusewindowsize

documentation.value: Custom hook that tracks window dimensions with resize listener.

documentation.value: Generic async operation hook with loading, error, and data states.

documentation.value: Creates a generic typed table component with column definitions.

completions.label: rpolymorphic

documentation.value: Creates a polymorphic component that can render as different HTML elements.
Pattern for coordinating multiple Suspense boundaries.
Wraps a component tree with an error boundary and fallback UI.

completions.label: roptimisticupdate

documentation.value: Pattern for optimistic UI updates with rollback on failure.
Named import of useId from react.
Named import of useTransition from react.
Named import of useDeferredValue from react.
Named import of startTransition from react.
Named imports for context creation and consumption.
Named import of flushSync for synchronous state updates.
Event type for drag and drop handlers.
Event type for focus and blur handlers.
Event type for touch event handlers on mobile devices.
Event type for clipboard operations (copy, paste, cut).
Event type for mouse wheel event handlers.
Event type for CSS animation event handlers.
Event type for CSS transition event handlers.
Event type for unified pointer events (mouse, touch, pen).
Base event type for UI events like scroll.

documentation.value: File drag and drop zone component.

documentation.value: Declarative interval hook with automatic cleanup.

completions.label: ruseanimationframe

documentation.value: Hook for running logic on every animation frame.

documentation.value: Combines useReducer with Context for global state management.

documentation.value: Creates a test file structure using React Testing Library.

completions.label: ruseonline

documentation.value: Hook to track browser online/offline status.
Type for a reducer function used with useReducer.
Extracts the action type from a Reducer type.
Extracts the state type from a Reducer type.
Type representing a React portal element.
Type for the error info object passed to componentDidCatch. Contains the componentStack.
